query: Ship this — commit the working tree and open a PR. We just finished the auth refactor and the gates are green.
Commit these changes and open a pull request against main. Don't merge yet, I want to look at it first.
Let's get this landed — push it up and create a PR, then merge it since CI is passing.
put up a PR for this please, branch off main, the change is the payment retry fix
I'm done with the feature. Take it to a pull request for me — the repo needs PRs, you can't push to main directly.
deliver this change. commit, branch, push, PR. merge if it's clean
Open a pull request for the current diff and merge it with rebase, delete the branch after.
Can you get these edits merged? main is protected so it'll need to go through a PR.
Create a PR for the work on this branch and then merge to main once it's up.
wrap this up into a pull request — the staging fix is ready to go out
Save a checkpoint before I /clear — task is half done, capture what files are dirty and the next steps.
Review my changes before I open a PR — anything wrong with this diff?
Implement the auth component from DESIGN/01_auth.md and run the verification gate.
What's the difference between git merge and git rebase for integrating a feature branch?
How do I configure branch protection rules and required status checks on a GitHub repo?
Resolve the merge conflict in src/server.ts between my branch and main.
Do a deep security review of the changed files before release.
Squash the last three commits on this branch into one with a cleaner message.
Set up a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests on every pull request.
Explain what a fast-forward merge is and when git can't do one.
